records.ety: [OE. heritage, eritage, OF. heritage, eritage, F. hritage, fr. hriter to inherit, LL. heriditare. See Hereditable.]

defs: That which is inherited, or passes from heir to heir; inheritance.
quotes: Part of my heritage, Which my dead father did bequeath to me.

defs: A possession; the Israelites, as God's chosen people; also, a flock under pastoral charge.
